_description: Model tier routing for the mentions packet pipeline. Models return strict JSON fields only; code is the final scorer, validator, renderer, and Telegram sender. Market price NEVER enters scoring.

cheap.role: preferred batch extractor / classifier over fetched source text (strict JSON, same schema as fallback)

cheap_fallback.role: extractor fallback when Gemini fails schema validation, times out, or returns unstable JSON

standard.role: packet analyst for normal paid packets

redteam.role: optional red-team / narrative heat / trap / X-card / live-discourse reviewer (strict JSON only; X chatter is narrative context, never source-backed evidence; cannot alter CPC scores, layer scores, postures, settlement fit, or layout)
